propositions: Change the main branch submit action from fast-forward-only to rebase-if-necessary in project.config.
Remove the Autosubmit label definition, its ACL, and the bot-only rebase-on-behalf per-ref grant.
Revisit the Verified copyCondition so submit still gates on Verified+1 and LLM-Review+1 under the new submit type.
Update setup-project.sh and smoke-check to drop references to the removed label and ACL.
Apply refs/meta/config in a quiet window with a DRY_RUN diff first, with a one-line back-out reverting to fast-forward-only.
Verify live that a green change lands via plain Submit under REBASE_IF_NECESSARY while textual-conflict changes are refused with a rebase-manually signal.
